name: Grimwit Stone-Eye
sd_appearance: A stooped, wiry gnome with a bushy silver beard and spectacles, Grimwit Stone-Eye stands before a table cluttered with vials, samples, and equipment. His skin, weathered and lined, is a stark contrast to his glossy black clothing, woven with lotus flower motifs in black glass. His chainmail and scale mail armor, worn and battle-scarred, bears tales of past contracts. A black glass lotus pin adorns his collar, and he carries a warhammer and a crossbow, one distinctive visual detail being the eye-shaped gem set into the hilt of his warhammer.
faction_visual: black shadow-woven clothing, lotus flower motifs in black glass, memory vials as jewellery
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
